title: pelargonium × eryngii
intro: Pelargonium × eryngii, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the family Geraniaceae, characterized by its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The essential oil extracted from its leaves has antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. Some of the health benefits associated with Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The herbal preparations of Rose Geranium, such as tea, tinctures, and essential oils, are commonly used to promote overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
